source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH Response_Data AS (
    SELECT 
        CAST(B.CreationDate AS DATE) AS ResponseDate, 
        B.Division, 
        COUNT(B.Survey_ID) AS Total_Response_Count
    FROM EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey B
    WHERE B.ActiveInd = 1
    GROUP BY CAST(B.CreationDate AS DATE), B.Division
),

Invite_Data AS (
    SELECT 
        CAST(A.CreationDate AS DATE) AS ResponseDate, 
        A.Division, 
        COUNT(A.Survey_ID) AS Total_Survey_Sent_Count 
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            CAST(Creation_Date AS DATE) AS CreationDate, 
            Division, 
            Survey_ID 
        FROM EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_invitations 
        WHERE Active_Ind = 1 
        AND Survey_ID NOT IN (
            SELECT Survey_ID FROM EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey WHERE ActiveInd = 1
        )

        UNION ALL

        SELECT 
            CAST(CreationDate AS DATE) AS ResponseDate, 
            Division, 
            Survey_ID 
        FROM EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey 
        WHERE ActiveInd = 1
    ) A
    GROUP BY A.CreationDate, A.Division
)

SELECT 
    COALESCE(A.ResponseDate, B.ResponseDate) AS Survey_Month, 
    COALESCE(A.Division, B.Division) AS Division, 
    COALESCE(A.Total_Response_Count, 0) AS Total_Response_Count, 
    COALESCE(B.Total_Survey_Sent_Count, 0) AS Total_Survey_Sent_Count, 
    0 AS Survey_Sent_Count_Medallia, 
    0 AS Survey_Sent_Count_Guild, 
    0 AS Response_Count_Medallia, 
    0 AS Response_Count_Guild, 
    CAST(
        (COALESCE(A.Total_Response_Count, 0) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(B.Total_Survey_Sent_Count, 0), 0) 
        AS DECIMAL(8,2)
    ) AS Response_Rate 
FROM Invite_Data B
FULL OUTER JOIN Response_Data A 
    ON B.ResponseDate = A.ResponseDate 
    AND B.Division = A.Division
ORDER BY Survey_Month, Division;
